pageContext.name: Daffy Duck
pageContext.description: You're Despicable!   Being one of the most popular of all Looney Tunes characters, no collection is complete without Daffy Duck! This highly-detailed sculpture depicts the typical Daffy that we all know and love. With his sassy attitude and classic base, this piece is a must-have for every classic Looney Tunes statue collector!  Don't miss the chance to add the Daffy Duck Sixth Scale Diorama to your cartoon collection.
